title: Lhand
compiled_truth: Lhand is an external contact at [Lemle](companies/lemle). Over the corpus period (1999-05-18 to 2001-11-19), Lhand sent 18 and received 15 emails, totalling 33 interactions. Top correspondents: [Robert D Morgan](people/robert-d-morgan-bhlp) (7), [David Owen](people/david-owen) (7), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (6), [Rusty Belflower](people/rusty-belflower) (5), [Gnemec](people/gnemec) (5).
